assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 2): Readmission Model

Readmitted (0/1) in sequence = label-derived shortcut. ECE early stopping = calibration bias in jointly-trained model. Both documented in design. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 2): Readmission Model

Concrete issues: readmitted flag shortcut (no ablation in design); ECE stopping criterion (Section 4) misaligned with discrimination hypothesis. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 2): Readmission Model

Strong temporal split. But readmitted (0/1) in 6-feature sequence creates label-shortcut concern. ECE as primary metric for model selection is wrong for a discrimination hypothesis. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2)

Unanimous critique_wins: 3/3.

Verdict: critique_wins
